shellCommands.command: /bin/bash -lc 'command -v build || true; python3 -m build --version 2>/dev/null || true; command -v uv || true'
/bin/bash -lc 'python3 -m pip install --user build && python3 -m build --wheel --outdir dist .'

/bin/bash -lc "sleep 0.2; curl -fsS http://localhost:8080/simple/vectorops/ && .verify-venv/bin/python -m pip install --index-url http://localhost:8080/simple vectorops==0.1.0 && .verify-venv/bin/python -c 'from vectorops import dotproduct; assert 1 == dotproduct([1,1], [0,1]); print(dotproduct([1, 2], [3, 4]))' && ps -p 2190 -o pid=,stat=,cmd="
/bin/bash -lc 'setsid nohup python3 pypi_server.py --port 8080 --directory dist > pypi-server.log 2>&1 < /dev/null & echo $!; sleep 0.5; ps -ef | rg '"'pypi_server.py' || true; cat pypi-server.log"

/bin/bash -lc "curl -fsS http://localhost:8080/simple/vectorops/ && .verify-venv/bin/python -m pip install --index-url http://localhost:8080/simple vectorops==0.1.0 && .verify-venv/bin/python -c 'from vectorops import dotproduct; assert 1 == dotproduct([1,1], [0,1]); print(dotproduct([1, 2], [3, 4]))' && .verify-venv/bin/pytest -q && ps -p 2216 -o pid=,stat=,cmd="

/bin/bash -lc 'python3 -m build --wheel --outdir dist . >/tmp/vectorops-build.log && rm -rf .verify-venv build vectorops.egg-info && curl -fsS http://localhost:8080/simple/vectorops/ && curl -fsSI http://localhost:8080/vectorops-0.1.0-py3-none-any.whl && ps -p 2216 -o pid=,stat=,cmd= && tail -5 /tmp/vectorops-build.log'
